meta.title: GetDocu — Important Documents, Made Simple
meta.description: AI-powered documents for Switzerland: rental applications, job applications, terminations. Done in minutes.

hero.pickCountry: Choose the {land} we should create your document for.
hero.pickCountryTagline: We help you boost your chances!
hero.headline: Important documents. Made simple.
hero.subheadline: GetDocu helps you create professional letters and documents — explained in your language, optimised for your country.

tools.title: What do you need?
tools.subtitle: Choose what you need. Pay only when you use it.

sampleDoc.eyebrow: This is what your finished document looks like

ausserterminliche-kuendigung.title: Terminate Early with Successor Tenant
ausserterminliche-kuendigung.description: Leave your lease early — with a successor-tenant proposal, correctly and on time.

ausserordentliche-kuendigung.title: Terminate for Good Cause
ausserordentliche-kuendigung.description: Leave your lease early for good cause — e.g. serious defects or an uninhabitable apartment.

komplettbewerbung.title: Complete Application
komplettbewerbung.description: Cover letter + CV in one — professional, perfectly matched, ready to send.
komplettbewerbung.uploadHint: Do you have an old CV? Upload it — as a photo, PDF or Word file. We read it automatically and integrate it into your new CV.

mietbewerbung.title: Rental Application
mietbewerbung.description: Convince landlords right away. Professional, personal, tailored to local standards.

jobbewerbung.title: Job Application
jobbewerbung.description: Show why you're the right person. Clear, convincing, professional.

kuendigung.title: Termination
kuendigung.description: Insurance, subscription, membership — cancel correctly and on time.

arbeitszeugnis.uploadHint: Upload your reference — as a photo, PDF or Word file. We read it automatically.
arbeitszeugnis.title: Improve Employment Reference
arbeitszeugnis.description: Your reference sounds mediocre? We rewrite it professionally.

maengelruege.photoGalleryHint: Upload up to 100 photos — they will be attached to the document.
maengelruege.title: Report Apartment Damage After Move-In
maengelruege.description: Report damage in your flat — in writing, on time, correctly addressed.

reklamation.uploadLabel: Upload a photo of the invoice or product (optional)
reklamation.uploadHint: Do you have a faulty invoice or a defective product? Upload a photo.
reklamation.title: Complaint Letter
reklamation.description: Defective goods, poor service, wrong invoice — complain clearly and firmly.

lebenslauf.uploadHint: Do you have an old CV? Upload it — as a photo, PDF or Word file. We read it automatically.
lebenslauf.title: CV Check
lebenslauf.description: Your CV is analyzed and professionally revised — tailored to your job market.

krankenkasse.title: Health Insurance Letter
krankenkasse.description: Premium reduction, benefit requests, cancellation — correctly worded.

kuendigung-wohnung.title: Terminate Rental
kuendigung-wohnung.description: Cancel your lease correctly — with notice period, address and confirmation request.

kuendigung-arbeit.title: Resign from Job
kuendigung-arbeit.description: Resign from your position professionally — clear, polite and on time.

tools.withdrawalConsent: I agree that delivery of the digital document begins immediately after payment, and I confirm that I thereby waive my statutory right of withdrawal. I have read and accept the Terms & Conditions.
tools.withdrawalError: Please confirm your consent to proceed.
tools.legalDisclaimer: The generated document is not a substitute for legal advice. Your form data is deleted immediately after generation.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps. No account needed.

step1.title: Fill out the form
step1.description: Answer a few simple questions — explained in your language.

step2.title: Preview for free
step2.description: See your document as a free preview with watermark — pay only when you're happy with it.

step3.title: Pay securely
step3.description: Pay {priceRange} by card via Stripe. No subscription, no hidden fees.

step4.title: Download & done
step4.description: Download your PDF. Your input is deleted immediately afterwards.

trust.guaranteeBody: If your document doesn't fit or you're not satisfied, we'll refund you in full. Just send us an email.
trust.title: Your data belongs to you
trust.subtitle: Privacy isn't an add-on — it's the foundation.
trust.point1: Your input (name, address, salary details) is only used to generate the document and deleted immediately afterwards.
trust.point2: You don't need an account. You only pay for the document you actually need.
trust.point3: To generate your document, your text is sent to Anthropic (USA) for processing — then deleted. More in our privacy policy.

items.q: Do I need to create an account?
items.a: No. No account, no registration. Fill out the form, pay, and download your document immediately.
Your input is used solely to generate your document and deleted immediately afterwards. There is no permanent storage.

items.q: Is there a subscription or hidden fees?
items.a: No. You pay a one-time fee of {priceRange} per document — depending on the type. No subscription, no follow-up costs.

items.q: In which language is the document created?
items.a: The document is created in your country's language — correctly phrased for authorities, landlords, and employers.
We'll refund you in full. Just send us an email — no hassle, no questions asked.
You can pay via TWINT, credit card (Visa, Mastercard), Apple Pay, or Google Pay. Payment is processed securely via Stripe.

legal.disclaimer: GetDocu does not provide legal advice. The generated documents are tools — you are responsible for their accuracy.

placeholders.optionalReason: Only if you'd like to provide a reason.
placeholders.motivationRental: Briefly describe why you want this apartment and what makes you a great tenant.
placeholders.companyResearch: e.g. This position suits me well. I want to work in this industry.
placeholders.whyYou: e.g. I am punctual, reliable and enjoy working in a team.
placeholders.existingCertificate: Paste the full text of your current reference letter here.
placeholders.certificateImprove: e.g. closing formula sounds negative, leadership skills missing, too short, …
placeholders.damageDescription: What is damaged/broken? Since when? Where exactly in the apartment?
placeholders.complaintDescription: Describe the issue factually: what, when, which order/service.
placeholders.desiredOutcome: e.g. full refund, free repair, replacement delivery, …
placeholders.existingCV: Paste the full text of your CV here.
placeholders.cvImprovements: e.g. I'm looking for my first job. / I had a gap in my CV.
placeholders.concernDetails: Describe your concern as precisely as possible.

fieldLabels.motivation: Why do you want this apartment?
fieldLabels.whyYou: Why are you the right person?
fieldLabels.type: What would you like to cancel?
fieldLabels.targetJob: What type of position are you applying for?

form.checkoutError: Error opening the payment page. Please try again.
form.previewPayNote: — Pay to receive the full document
form.checkBody: Please check your details: full name, address, e-mail address, company name and exact job title. Incorrect details can affect the document.
form.readyBody: Pay {price} once for the complete, print-ready document — no subscription, no account.
form.photoHint: Upload a photo — it will be embedded in the top right of the document. In Switzerland a photo is common but not mandatory.
form.cvPhotoHint: For a convincing CV we recommend a friendly, professional photo — it makes your application more personal and leaves a lasting first impression.
form.uploadPrompt: Upload a photo, PDF or Word file
form.takePhoto: Take a photo or choose from gallery
form.changeFile: Tap to choose a different file
form.autoCalculated: ✓ Calculated automatically — you can adjust the date.

fieldHints.whatToImprove: No problem if you don't know — we analyse the reference and improve it automatically.
